mapper.select: SELECT create_time, accessType AS action FROM aro_access_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE aro_personnel p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT name, COUNT(*) * 10 AS total_exp FROM aro_access_log WHERE accessType = 1 GROUP BY name ) l ON l.name = p.name SET p.total_exp = COALESCE(l.total_exp, 0)
